creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 253849
v0 (apply via `git am`)

While doing initial testing with default config, I discovered that graphs page looks a bit weird, especially considering default theme is black. At the same time, nginx errored like this:
*772 open() "/usr/local/etc/nginx/html/monitorix/css/black.css" failed (2: No such file or directory)

Checked distfile and found 2 CSS inside, so attaching a patch to install those, though I'm unsure if I did that best way.
Portlint has also been pet meanwhile.
